raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Immediately flush eye with clean, lukewarm water or saline for at least 15 minutes.
STEP 2: Hold eyelids open and rotate eye to ensure all surfaces are rinsed.
STEP 3: Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
DO NOT: Rub the eye or use neutralizing chemicals.
ESCALATE: Seek emergency medical attention immediately. Bring the product container or label.

immediate_steps: Immediately flush eye with clean, lukewarm water or saline for at least 15 minutes.
Hold eyelids open and rotate eye to ensure all surfaces are rinsed.
Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
do_not_do: Rub the eye or use neutralizing chemicals.
escalate_when: Seek emergency medical attention immediately. Bring the product container or label.
